entries.summary: Completed B7 screening execution and leakage validation: added B7 null-gate support, fixed B7-only loader to avoid irrelevant FM cache mismatch, ran B7 T3 screening and null gate remotely, and recorded B7 as screening-negative.
top_rejection_reasons: Initial null-gate aggregation used one test subject at a time.
Test file initially targeted a nonexistent validation API and skipped instead of testing.
Remote cache mismatch required B7-specific V2-only loading.
lessons_learned: Remote execution exposed an FM/rocket cache mismatch that B7 should not depend on; loader selection must match feature needs.
Null-gate CCC must be computed over full test folds, not one subject at a time, because CCC is undefined for single samples.
The existing canary helper reports model performance under an appended unseen constant feature; interpret it as canary non-exploitation rather than null-performance.
gpu.sh --push-cache follows symlinks poorly for rocket_recordings.npz; explicit upload of the symlink target was needed.
B7 screening was negative: CCC 0.1899 versus B1 0.2073, so no LOOCV should run.
